Off Calendar Jul-22-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Entitlement (Probate Code Section 11700)
Off Calendar Jan-30-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Petitioner.

Mr. Siracusa stated that there is a little bit of cash, but it will be spent on the cost of administration and that there are no objections. Mr. Siracusa also stated that the Administrator tried to do the thing that was fairest to the Family and the Brother who is incarcerated and less offensive to the other Siblings. The Court stated that Jerry is entitled to $1,000.00, but the order can be modified to reflect that the Personal Representative has authority to distribute the additional $12,000.00. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Entitlement (subject to review and modification of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (326 Winding Way, San Francisco, California 94112-4452)
Off Calendar Sep-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi for Anthony De La Rosa (Administrator).

The sale was confirmed at $1,100,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed August 21, 2019. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order
